description: Connect to Freshservice ITSM to sync tickets, assets (CMDB), agents, groups, service catalog items, and change requests.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Freshservice API key. Found in Profile Settings → Your API Key (or Admin → Agents → Your Agent → API Key).

install_fields.label: Subdomain (e.g. mycompany)
install_fields.description: Your Freshservice subdomain. If your URL is https://mycompany.freshservice.com, enter mycompany.
